## Method Request

### Method Name
The name of the method you would like to see included.

### Citation
Please provide a citation (e.g., DOI, arXiv link, or PubMed ID).

### Language
What programming language is the method implemented in? (e.g., Python, R, C++)

### Availability
Where can the method be obtained?
- PyPI package name:
- CRAN package name:
- GitHub repository URL:
- Other:

### Why It Should Be Included
Explain why this method fills a gap or is important for the benchmark.

### Proposed Track
Which benchmark track(s) should this method be evaluated in? (e.g., detection, classification, trajectory)

### Local Testing
- [ ] I have tested this method locally on the REACH toy data.
- [ ] I have not tested this method locally.
